title: Cycle slogans in Globe tab + fix perpetual loading bug in Stations tab

requirements.text: Add the same cycling anti-subscription slogans (with fade transitions) to the GlobeView tab, matching the behavior already implemented in NowPlayingPanel and FullscreenOverlay.

quotes: cycle the slogans in the globe tab too

acceptanceCriteria: Slogans are visible in the Globe tab and rotate through the same list used in NowPlayingPanel/FullscreenOverlay
Transitions use the same fade effect as the existing slogan cycling implementation
Slogan display does not obstruct globe interaction (markers, hover tooltips, OrbitControls)

requirements.text: Fix the perpetual loading state for stations in the main (Stations) tab. Stations should either display correctly or show a clear error state — they must not remain stuck in a loading spinner indefinitely.

quotes: currently stations are perpetually loading in the main tab, seems like a bug

acceptanceCriteria: Opening the Stations tab resolves to either a populated station list or a visible error/empty state within a reasonable timeout
No infinite loading spinner is shown when the Radio Browser API has returned data or an error
Retry logic or fallback handling is in place if the initial fetch fails

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui

Slogan list and cycling logic must remain consistent with the existing implementation in NowPlayingPanel and FullscreenOverlay — extract shared logic if needed rather than duplicating divergent copies
nonGoals: Changing the slogan content or timing intervals
Modifying backend station storage or favorites logic
